$comment: External mock allowlist. Single source of truth for both integration_proof.md §3 and the jaot/no-e2e-mock-jaot-boundary ESLint rule. Per D-07/D-08. Add entries here when a new paid-SaaS or LLM endpoint must be mockable in e2e/ specs. Each pattern is consumed via new RegExp(entry.pattern) — escape dots as \. to avoid matching similarly-named hosts.

domains.reason: Stripe payment API — charges per request; credentials not in CI
Resend email API — charges per email; credentials not in CI
Claude LLM API — charges per token; not in CI budget
OpenAI API — charges per token; not in CI budget
